_readme: Everything editable on the site lives here. Edit by hand or use admin.html (the visual editor). Colors are any CSS color. Images are paths under assets/img/ — drop new files in that folder and reference them here. Reels are full Instagram reel URLs.

text.heroEyebrow: Las Vegas · Weddings · Corporate · Private Events
text.heroTagline: Music that creates your most precious moments.
text.heroEnd: Turn the night all the way up.
text.aboutLede: It was inevitable for DJ Mo and the entertainment business to meet.
text.vibesSub: Straight from the reels — tap for sound.
text.marquee: Weddings ✦ Corporate Events ✦ Private Parties ✦ Las Vegas ✦
text.aboutP1: Mo was 20 years old when he downloaded a DJ app onto his iPad. Playing in front of people brought out a different element — and DJ'ing became the thing that truly makes him happy. He cut his teeth at Helen Fitzgerald's in St. Louis, learning the fundamentals of being a great MC and DJ, before taking his craft into the wedding industry.
text.aboutP2: Today, based in Las Vegas, he blends those fundamentals with a style all his own. His song selection, energy, enthusiasm, and versatility make him one of the most entertaining wedding and corporate event DJs in the city.
text.aboutQuote: Anyone can put together chart-topping songs and press play — but it takes a special set of ears to hear sounds before loading them into the deck.
text.cinemaQuote: It takes a special set of ears to hear sounds before loading them into the deck.
text.venuesNote: From ballroom weddings to stadium-scale corporate events — and destination dates from Miami Beach to Northern California.
text.galleryCta: Tag @djmoblvd to be featured on our Instagram
text.availBody: Lock it in before someone else does — popular dates go fast 6–12 months out.
text.footerLine: Las Vegas, NV · DJ'ing for you & only you
text.djepSub: Fill this out and it lands directly in DJ Mo's event system — you'll hear back fast.
text.footerFine: © {year} DJ Mo Blvd LLC. All rights reserved.
text.alacarteNote: Build your own experience — every add-on can be attached to any package.
text.portalNotBooked: Not booked yet? Check your date here.
text.portalGuestFeatures:
Request songs before the event
Vote on what gets played
No account needed

reelsLibrary._note: More of Mo's reels, by plays as of 2026-06-11 — swap any of these into the reels list above.

stats.small: Based in Las Vegas, travels anywhere

services.title: Weddings
services.desc: From the processional to the last dance — ceremony audio, cocktail hour, wireless mics for your vows, and a dance floor that never empties.

services.title: Corporate
services.desc: Conference energy, brand activations, award nights and arena-scale productions. Polished, on-brand, and engineered to keep your people locked in.

services.title: Private Events
services.desc: Any excuse to celebrate. Custom playlists built around you and your crowd.

process.title: Check your date
process.desc: Send the inquiry form with your date and venue. You'll hear back fast — popular dates go first.

process.title: Consult
process.desc: Unlimited consultations. Talk vibe, must-plays, do-not-plays, and every moment that matters to you.

process.title: Plan
process.desc: Build your timeline and custom playlist in the online planning portal — everything coordinated before the big day.

process.title: Party
process.desc: DJ Mo handles the music, the mic, and the lighting. You handle the dance floor.

reviews.quote: Thanks for making our event the best!! It was beyond our imagination.
reviews.name: Patty

faq.a: Every package includes a customized personal playlist. We build your must-play and do-not-play lists together in unlimited consultations — and Mo reads the room from there.
Yes — professional emcee services come standard in every package. Grand entrance, toasts, first dance, send-off: every moment is announced and on time.

faq.q: Can you cover our ceremony too?
faq.a: The Paradise package and up include on-site ceremony music — so every word is heard in the back row.

Three packages — Anthem from $2,000, Paradise from $2,500, and The Lakes from $4,000 — plus à la carte add-ons like photo booth, cold sparklers, and dancing on the clouds. See the full packages & pricing page.

faq.q: Do you travel outside Las Vegas?
faq.a: Based in Las Vegas, available anywhere. DJ Mo has played destination events from Miami Beach to Northern California.
A content-creation add-on included in The Lakes package: They specialize in telling unforgettable wedding stories through short form video and photo content all captured on an iPhone.

packagesPage.heroBody: Thank you for considering us to be a part of your special day. Explore our meticulously crafted packages — designed as a foundation and fully customizable — and envision the experience waiting for you.

packages.name: Anthem
features: Up to four hours of reception services

pkgFaq.q: How far in advance should I book?
pkgFaq.a: As early as possible to secure your date — popular dates fill up quickly. We advise booking at least 6–12 months in advance.

pkgFaq.q: Can I customize elements within the packages?
pkgFaq.a: Absolutely. The packages are designed as a foundation, and we welcome customization to tailor the experience — mix in any à la carte add-on.

seo.title: Las Vegas Wedding DJ | DJ Mo Blvd — Weddings, Corporate & Private Events
seo.description: DJ Mo Blvd is a top-rated Las Vegas wedding DJ and MC for weddings, corporate events, and private parties. 5-star reviews and unforgettable dance floors. Check your date today.
